title: Better Happy Ghast Harness
description: This pack let you customize your Happy Ghats even further by making the harness dyeable, choose from more than 5 million colors the one YOU want !
body:
Make the Harness Dyeable like a leather armor !

/!\ not recommended for the undecided /!\

from 16 colored options to more than 5 million !

![better harness](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8673734bc1257b4fac638cacde45b39f39f24ae3_0.webp)

You can craft your harness with any colored wool, and add any dye you want to change the color, and if you don't like what you made, you can right-click on a cauldron filled with water to turn your harness white and start again !

if you run this as a datapack, the resourcepack is required, if you run this as a mod you're good to go, enjoy !



/!\ This pack only work with Harness crafted after it was installed, and it will not work with harness from the creative inventory.


Also if you are a datapack maker: with this pack you can use all the colored harness as dummy items ! (make sure to remove their default components)


if you have any issue or feedback, join this discord: https://discord.gg/SxarRKTw8k
